description_long: This is a stylized plastic doll with a blocky, articulated body reminiscent of LEGO minifigures. The doll features medium-length, tousled brown hair with layered, spiky strands covering much of the face. It wears a dark brown cropped t-shirt with the word 'COWGIRL' printed in white across the chest, paired with matching brown pants and light brown shoes. The arms are posed in a dynamic, bent position, with one hand open and the other closed into a fist. The facial features are mostly obscured by the hair, giving the doll a mysterious appearance. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, typical of injection-molded plastic toys.
description: A blocky, articulated plastic doll with tousled brown hair, a 'COWGIRL' t-shirt, brown pants, and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the layered, spiky brown hair and the back of the brown t-shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the doll's bent arm and the profile of the hair and clothing.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the 'COWGIRL' t-shirt, mostly obscured face, and both arms in dynamic poses.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the doll's other bent arm and the side profile of the hair and pants.
attribute_clothing_style: Cropped dark brown t-shirt with 'COWGIRL' text in white, paired with high-waisted brown pants and light brown shoes, reflecting a casual Western-inspired look.
attribute_pose: The doll's torso is upright, with both arms bent at the elbows—one arm raised and the other extended forward. The legs are straight and together, and the head is slightly tilted downward, partially covered by hair.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is mostly obscured by the hair, but the visible portion suggests a neutral or expressionless face.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, tousled brown hair with layered, spiky strands covering the forehead and partially obscuring the face.
